damagerender.configuration.title: DamageRender
Maximum radius. Damage numbers farther than this are not rendered.
damagerender.configuration.maxShowRender: Maximum number of damage numbers rendered at once.
damagerender.configuration.minValueDispl: Damage below this value is not rendered.
damagerender.configuration.enableCombine: Whether to merge nearby damage numbers of the same type.
damagerender.configuration.mergeDistance: Squared radius within which damage numbers are merged.
damagerender.configuration.mergeMaxAge.t: Damage numbers younger than this many ticks (since spawn) can be merged.
